metadata.title: Tiqani — Trusted Technical Services Platform
metadata.description: Find verified technicians, discuss your project, sign electronically, and manage payments through protected stages.

hero.title: Trusted technical work, protected from agreement to completion
hero.description: Find verified technicians, discuss your project, agree on price, sign electronically, and release payments only when you approve completed work.

trust.verifiedProfilesDesc: Every technician undergoes identity verification before joining the platform
trust.electronicContractsDesc: Digital contracts signed by both parties with integrity evidence
trust.stageBasedDesc: Project stages with milestone-based approval and payments
trust.protectedPaymentsDesc: Client funds are managed securely through the project lifecycle
trust.platformRecordedDesc: All agreements and evidence preserved on the platform
trust.transparentRatingsDesc: Honest feedback from real completed projects

howItWorks.title: How Tiqani Works
howItWorks.description: A clear, secure process from finding a technician to completing your project.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Browse verified technicians with transparent profiles and ratings.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Discuss your project details in a protected chat environment.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Receive a detailed price offer and agree on the project scope.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Both parties digitally sign the same frozen contract version.
howItWorks.step5Desc: Funds are managed through protected stages, not released directly.
howItWorks.step6Desc: Review and approve work. Payment releases only on your approval.

categories.title: Service Categories
categories.description: Find the right technical professional for your needs.
categories.networkingDesc: Network setup, configuration, and maintenance for homes and businesses.
categories.softwareDesc: Custom software, websites, and applications built to your requirements.
categories.cybersecurityDesc: Security assessments, protection systems, and data safety solutions.
categories.maintenanceDesc: Repair and maintenance of computers, phones, and electronic devices.
categories.surveillanceDesc: Camera installation, access control, and monitoring system setup.
categories.consultingDesc: Expert technical advice, planning, and project consultation services.

whyTiqani.title: Why Tiqani
whyTiqani.description: Built to bring trust and transparency to technical service transactions.
whyTiqani.verifiedProfessionalsDesc: Each technician undergoes identity verification before joining, building a community of trusted experts.
whyTiqani.secureCommunicationDesc: Every conversation is protected, keeping your project details confidential.
whyTiqani.transparentOffersDesc: Receive clear, detailed price proposals before any work begins — no surprises.
whyTiqani.electronicContractsDesc: Both parties sign the same digital contract, creating a binding record of the agreement.
whyTiqani.stageBasedDeliveryDesc: Projects are divided into stages. You review and approve each phase before payment is released.
whyTiqani.protectedPaymentsDesc: Funds are held securely and released according to approved milestones, not upfront.
whyTiqani.preservedEvidenceDesc: All contracts, communications, and approvals are preserved on the platform for reference.
whyTiqani.ratingsAccountabilityDesc: Completed projects build a transparent reputation system that ensures quality and accountability.

contractProtection.title: Contract and Payment Protection
contractProtection.description: Your project is protected at every stage with dual digital signatures and stage-managed payments.
contractProtection.discussDesc: Chat with your technician to define the project scope and requirements.
contractProtection.agreeDesc: Receive and agree to a detailed price offer outlining all deliverables.
contractProtection.signDesc: Both parties digitally sign the same frozen contract version.
contractProtection.fundDesc: Fund the project securely. Payments are managed by stage.
contractProtection.deliverDesc: Technician completes work in stages. You review each deliverable.
contractProtection.approveDesc: Approve completed stages to release payments. You stay in control.
contractProtection.note: Tiqani records the agreement and document-integrity evidence. Payment is managed according to project stages. Client approval releases stage payments.

technicians.title: Featured Technicians
technicians.description: Meet some of our verified technical professionals.
technicians.noTechnicians: No technicians available at this time

cta.clientDesc: Find a verified technical professional for your project. Browse categories, compare profiles, and start your project with confidence.
cta.technicianDesc: Join Tiqani as a technician and access clients who value quality work, clear contracts, and secure payments.

footer.description: Tiqani connects clients with verified technical professionals through a protected platform featuring electronic contracts and stage-managed payments.

errors.notFoundDesc: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
errors.genericDesc: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.offlineDesc: Please check your connection and try again.

auth.loginDescription: Sign in to your Tiqani account
auth.registerDescription: Join Tiqani as a client or technician
auth.jobTitleRequired: Job title is required for technicians
auth.requiredFields: Please fill in all required fields
auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email to receive a reset code
auth.checkEmailDescription: If an account exists, a reset code has been sent.
auth.resetPasswordDescription: Enter the code from your email and a new password
auth.resetSuccessDescription: You can now sign in with your new password.

profile.aboutPlaceholder: Describe your experience, skills, and services you offer...
profile.saveError: Failed to save changes. Please try again.
profile.approvedDesc: Your profile has been approved and you are visible to clients.
profile.pendingApprovalDesc: Your profile is submitted and waiting for admin review.

onboarding.title: Technician Onboarding
onboarding.description: Complete the steps below to set up your profile and start receiving project offers from clients.
onboarding.approvedDesc: Your profile is live. Clients can now find and hire you.
onboarding.pendingDesc: Your profile has been submitted to admins for review. You will be notified once approved.
onboarding.notSubmittedDesc: Complete all required fields above to submit your profile for admin review.

marketplace.title: Find a Technician
marketplace.description: Browse verified technicians, compare profiles, and find the right professional for your project.
marketplace.searchHint: Type to search technicians by name, job title, or biography. Press Enter to submit.
marketplace.loadError: Failed to load technicians. Please try again.
marketplace.noResultsDesc: Try adjusting your filters or check back later for new technicians.
marketplace.noResultsFilteredDesc: No technicians match the current filters. Try adjusting or clearing them.
marketplace.profileNotFoundDesc: This profile may have been removed or the link is invalid.

clientRequests.empty: You have no service requests yet.
clientRequests.confirmCancel: Are you sure you want to cancel this request?
clientRequests.confirmWithdraw: Are you sure you want to withdraw this request?

errors.loadFailed: Failed to load requests. Please try again.

requestForm.title: New Service Request
requestForm.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the service you need in detail...

errors.submitFailed: Failed to submit request. Please try again.

requestValidation.titleMin: Title must be at least 5 characters
requestValidation.titleMax: Title must be at most 255 characters
requestValidation.descriptionMin: Description must be at least 20 characters
requestValidation.descriptionMax: Description must be at most 5000 characters

technicianRequests.confirmAccept: Accept this request? You will be expected to follow up.
technicianRequests.confirmDecline: Are you sure you want to decline this request?
